---
title: "Opportunities"
---

ForgeLab Carpentries isn't only about learning — it's a pathway from skills to real work.

## From workshops to opportunities

The journey is deliberate:

1. **Learn** — complete hands-on workshops across Foundations, Robotics, and Applied AI.
2. **Verify** — earn micro-credentials through instructor checkout and capstone projects.
3. **Connect** — surface those verified skills to teams hiring for robotics, autonomy, and AI roles
   through the **[placements portal](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app)**.

The portal matches the evidence you build here — completed tracks, capstones, and credentials —
to concrete openings, so your learning leads somewhere.

## On the placements portal

The [placements portal](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app) is live. Three steps take you
from workshops to offers:

1. **Build your profile** — [sign in](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app/login) and add your
   details. Workshops you complete here appear as a **verified graduate badge** on your
   [profile](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app/profile).
2. **Confirm your Right to Work** — declare your status and add your Home Office **share code** on the
   [Right to Work](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app/profile/right-to-work) page, then submit
   it for review. Our team verifies it and you can see the outcome on your profile.
   *Share code only — we never store passport or visa scans.*
3. **Apply with confidence** — [browse open roles](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app/jobs) in
   robotics, autonomy, and AI and apply directly to hiring teams.

::: {.callout-note}
You can browse and apply to roles without an account. Signing in adds a profile, your verified
graduate badge, and Right to Work confirmation — which help hiring teams move faster. We store only a
Home Office share code (kept 90 days after verification), never document scans.
:::

## Browse the portal

[**Browse open opportunities →**](https://forge-lab-platform-portal.vercel.app/jobs)

The portal lists open roles in robotics, autonomy, and AI and matches them to the tracks, capstones,
and credentials you've completed here. Talk to your instructors about getting your capstone work
ready to showcase.

## For instructors & partners

If your team is hiring and wants to source from ForgeLab graduates, or you'd like to contribute a
capstone brief tied to a real role, see the
[Capstones & Certification track](https://github.com/FrankAsanteVanLaarhoven/ForgeLabCarpentries/blob/main/curriculum/tracks/capstones-certification.md).
